desc.en: The Madrid Metro is the urban rail transit system of Madrid, the capital of Spain. It was opened on October 17, 1919 by King Al-Fonsu XIII. There are about 300 stations in the whole network, of which 27 are two-line transfer stations, 12 are three-line transfer stations, and 1 is a four-line transfer station (Avenida de América Station, including Line 4, Line 6, Line 7 and Line 9). The whole subway network includes thirteen main lines, with a total length of about 293 kilometers, which is one of the fastest growing subway networks in Europe. There are 3 stations that provide transfers on the same line to other areas, and 21 stations provide transfers to the Madrid Suburban Line. On July 16, 2021, Grand Avenue Station was renovated and put into use again.
desc.zh: 马德里地铁是西班牙首都马德里的城市轨道交通系统，于1919年10月17日由当时国王阿方素十三世开幕。全网约有300个车站，其中27个为两线转乘站，12个为3线转乘站，1个是四线转乘站（美洲大道站，Avenida de América，包含四号线，六号线，七号线和九号线）。全个地铁网路包括十三条主线，合计长度约293公里，是欧洲发展最快的地铁网络之一。有3站提供同线转乘，以前往其他地区，而有21站提供与马德里近郊线的转乘。2021年7月16日，格兰大道站经翻修后重新投用。
